title: Elytra Durability Display
description: This is a data pack that displays the durability of the elytra.
body:
Shows durability and remaining time when flying with elytra

It will be displayed like\
216 / 432          **|||||||||||||||**|||||||||||||||          3:36 / 7:12

If it is within 1 minute, it will be displayed in red as shown below and the bar standard will be adjusted to 1 minute.\
50 / 432          **|||||||||||||||||||||||||**|||||          0:50 / 7:12

It also detects unbreaking enchantments and predicts the remaining time.\
For example, the total estimated time for Unbreaking 3 is 28:48.

We plan to update to 1.20.5 or later
